goals.short_name: British Columbians have secure, sustainably managed water

main_services.name: Get a licence to use water
Manage drought, flood and dam risk

goals.short_name: Provincial public land is used and stewarded sustainably

main_services.name: Get authorization to use Crown land
Plan and map provincial public land

goals.short_name: B.C.'s fish and wildlife are healthy and sustainably used

acts.summary: Governs the authorization, allocation and use of surface water and groundwater in B.C., including licensing, change approvals, groundwater protection and dam safety. Replaced most of the former Water Act on February 29, 2016.

sections.title: Water licences and approvals
sections.description: Authorizes the diversion and use of surface water and non-domestic groundwater through water licences and short-term use approvals.

services.name: Apply for a water licence
services.ms_name: Get a licence to use water

services.name: Apply for a short-term water use approval
services.ms_name: Get a licence to use water

sections.title: Change approvals and notification of in-stream work
sections.description: Requires a licence, change approval or notification before making changes in and about a stream.

services.name: Apply for a change approval or notify the ministry of in-stream work
services.ms_name: Get a licence to use water

sections.title: Groundwater use and well registration
sections.description: Requires a water licence for non-domestic groundwater use and sets standards for well construction, maintenance and registration.

services.name: Register your domestic water well
services.ms_name: Get a licence to use water

services.name: Get a groundwater licence for non-domestic use
services.ms_name: Get a licence to use water

sections.title: Dam safety requirements
sections.description: Sets construction, inspection, emergency planning and reporting requirements for regulated dams.

services.name: Meet dam safety inspection and reporting requirements
services.ms_name: Manage drought, flood and dam risk

acts.summary: Governs the incorporation, membership and management of water users' communities — groups of six or more water licensees who share a diversion, storage or delivery system. Formerly Part 3 of the Water Act.

sections.title: Formation and governance of water users' communities
sections.description: Sets out how a water users' community is incorporated, named and managed by the Comptroller of Water Rights.

services.name: Join or manage a Water Users' Community
services.ms_name: Manage drought, flood and dam risk

acts.summary: Regulates privately owned and operated water utilities that deliver water for domestic use, alongside the Utilities Commission Act.

sections.title: Regulation of private water utilities
sections.description: Requires private water utilities to provide safe, clean water to the households they serve.

services.name: Get water service from a private water utility
services.ms_name: Manage drought, flood and dam risk

acts.summary: Governs the administration, disposition and registration of provincial Crown land, including leases, licences of occupation and Crown grants.

sections.title: Disposition of Crown land
sections.description: Sets out how the minister may dispose of surveyed or unsurveyed Crown land by lease, licence of occupation, right of way or Crown grant.

services.name: Apply to lease, purchase or use Crown land
services.ms_name: Get authorization to use Crown land

sections.title: Crown land registry
sections.description: Continues the Crown land registry that records all Crown land administered by the government and its disposition.

services.name: Search the Crown land registry
services.ms_name: Get authorization to use Crown land

sections.title: Authorized Crown land uses
sections.description: Establishes tenure categories and application processes for specific Crown land uses.

services.name: Get a Crown land tenure for aggregate or quarry material extraction
services.ms_name: Get authorization to use Crown land

services.name: Get a Crown land tenure for a recreation or tourism business
services.ms_name: Get authorization to use Crown land

acts.summary: Governs the licensing of hunting, trapping, guiding and freshwater fishing in B.C., and sets rules for wildlife management, compulsory reporting and inspection.

sections.title: Hunting licences
sections.description: Requires a valid hunting licence and Fish and Wildlife ID to hunt in B.C.

services.name: Buy a hunting licence
services.ms_name: Hunt in B.C.

sections.title: Limited Entry Hunting
sections.description: Authorizes controlled-draw hunting authorizations for specific species, areas and time periods.

services.name: Apply for Limited Entry Hunting
services.ms_name: Hunt in B.C.

sections.title: Guide outfitter licensing
sections.description: Sets eligibility, exam and fee requirements for guide outfitter licences and assistant hunting guides.

services.name: Get a guide outfitter licence
services.ms_name: Hunt in B.C.

services.name: Hire or become an assistant hunting guide
services.ms_name: Hunt in B.C.

sections.title: Compulsory reporting and inspection
sections.description: Requires hunters to report harvests and submit certain species for compulsory inspection or disease testing.

services.name: Report your hunting harvest
services.ms_name: Hunt in B.C.

services.name: Get your harvest tested for Chronic Wasting Disease
services.ms_name: Protect and manage wildlife

sections.title: Trapping licences
sections.description: Requires a licence to trap fur-bearing animals in B.C.

services.name: Trap fur-bearing animals in B.C.
services.ms_name: Hunt in B.C.

sections.title: Freshwater fishing licensing
sections.description: Requires a valid freshwater fishing licence to fish for any species in non-tidal waters.

services.name: Buy a freshwater fishing licence
services.ms_name: Fish in B.C. waters

sections.title: Angling guide licensing
sections.description: Requires a valid angling guide licence to provide guided freshwater fishing services.

services.name: Get an angling guide licence
services.ms_name: Fish in B.C. waters

sections.title: Freshwater fishing regulations
sections.description: Sets water- and species-specific rules, bag limits and season dates for freshwater fishing.

services.name: Check freshwater fishing regulations before you fish
services.ms_name: Fish in B.C. waters
